request: 实现登录限流并补充测试

plan.request: 实现登录限流并补充测试

modelTiers.label: Cheap
modelTiers.description: Low-cost tier for read-only analysis and low-risk generation.

modelTiers.label: Standard
modelTiers.description: Balanced tier for local code changes with ordinary risk.

modelTiers.label: Premium
modelTiers.description: Strong tier for high-risk work, hard verification, and final review.

tasks.title: 读取项目结构与需求上下文
tasks.goal: Understand the workspace and clarify the requested outcome: 实现登录限流并补充测试
acceptance: request is preserved in the run trace
routingReason: low-risk, easy-to-verify task can use the cheap tier

tasks.title: 生成任务合同与执行约束
tasks.goal: Turn the request into explicit worker-safe task contracts.
forbiddenActions: modify files outside an approved task contract
acceptance: each executable task has acceptance criteria
each executable task has forbidden actions
routingReason: low-risk, easy-to-verify task can use the cheap tier

tasks.title: 实现核心代码变更
tasks.goal: Apply the requested implementation inside the approved workspace scope.
forbiddenActions: edit files outside the approved allowlist
acceptance: implementation matches the approved task contract
changed files remain inside the allowlist
routingReason: task needs the standard tier because risk, context, or verification is non-trivial

tasks.title: 补充测试与验证命令
tasks.goal: Add or identify verification that proves the requested behavior.
acceptance: new behavior has test coverage when code changes are made
routingReason: task needs the standard tier because risk, context, or verification is non-trivial

tasks.title: 运行验证并收集证据
tasks.goal: Run configured checks and capture the evidence needed for final review.
acceptance: verification results include command, exit code, and output summary
routingReason: low-risk, easy-to-verify task can use the cheap tier

tasks.title: 最终审查与交付报告
tasks.goal: Review the full run, explain routing decisions, and prepare the final report.
acceptance: final report includes task graph, routing, and verification evidence
routingReason: final verification always uses the premium tier

estimatedCost.note: V0 skeleton records routing tiers but does not call real model providers.

plan.riskSummary: high: 1 high-risk task(s), 1 medium-risk task(s), 4 low-risk task(s)
